source_name: EIA Electric Sales Revenue and Average Price — Table 5.6.A industrial avg
notes: US industrial average electricity price for 2024; EIA report released Oct 2025

source_name: Educated guess — US industrial water rate proxy
notes: EDUCATED GUESS: Approximates ~1.5 USD/m3 based on typical US municipal/industrial rates reported in water utility surveys. No single authoritative national source exists for industrial process water.

source_name: Educated guess — US wastewater treatment cost proxy
notes: EDUCATED GUESS: Approximates ~1.8 USD/m3. Consistent with EPA and AWWA survey ranges for industrial wastewater disposal. Actual cost is highly site-specific.

source_name: ICIS/UC Berkeley chemical price guide — NaOH bulk industrial range
notes: Range 0.30-0.70 USD/kg for bulk caustic soda depending on grade and region; 0.50 is mid-range screening value. Replace with vendor quote for project-grade pricing.

source_name: ICIS/UC Berkeley chemical price guide — H2SO4 bulk commodity range
notes: Sulfuric acid is a high-volume commodity; 0.08-0.15 USD/kg is typical bulk range. Replace with delivered quote.

source_name: ICIS/UC Berkeley chemical price guide — technical-grade H3PO4
notes: Technical-grade phosphoric acid benchmark for TEA screening; range 0.60-1.20 USD/kg depending on purity.

source_name: USGS Mineral Commodity Summaries 2025 — magnesium compounds
notes: EDUCATED GUESS: MgCl2 is a low-value industrial salt. 0.15-0.30 USD/kg is consistent with USGS magnesium compound pricing. USGS MCS 2025 covers Mg compounds but not MgCl2 specifically.

source_name: NETL Cradle-to-Gate LCA Model for Alternative Sources of CO2 (2013) — merchant CO2 proxy
notes: Delivered CO2 pricing varies strongly by region and purity; 0.04-0.15 USD/kg typical range. NETL 2013 report covers CO2 supply chain costs.

source_name: World Bank Commodity Price Data (Pink Sheet) — ammonia
notes: World Bank monthly Pink Sheet tracks global ammonia benchmark; 2020-2025 range ~0.30-1.20 USD/kg. 0.60 is near 5-year median.

source_name: World Bank Commodity Price Data (Pink Sheet) — urea
notes: World Bank monthly Pink Sheet tracks global urea benchmark; 2020-2025 range ~0.25-0.80 USD/kg. 0.40 is near 5-year median.

source_name: Matassa et al. (2016) and Pikaar et al. (2018) — SCP from HOB TEA benchmarks
notes: EDUCATED GUESS: SCP does not have a transparent commodity index. Pikaar et al. 2018 Env Sci Technol estimated ~2.0 USD/kg MSP for HOB-SCP at scale. Fishmeal benchmark ~1.5 USD/kg (FAO). Range 1.5-3.0 USD/kg for feed-grade SCP.

source_name: BLS OEWS May 2023 — SOC 51-8091 Chemical Plant and System Operators
notes: BLS median hourly wage ~35 USD; loaded wage (1.35x benefits multiplier) gives ~48 USD/h. SOC 51-8091 is the correct occupational code.

source_name: Humbird et al. (2011) NREL/TP-5100-47764 — biochemical conversion design report
notes: Annual maintenance as fraction of fixed capital; standard NREL nth-plant assumption

source_name: Humbird et al. (2011) NREL/TP-5100-47764 — biochemical conversion design report
notes: Supervision and overhead fraction of direct labor; NREL standard bioprocess TEA convention

source_name: Humbird et al. (2011) NREL/TP-5100-47764 — Lang factor for bioprocess plants
notes: Lang factor 3.0 is standard for fluid-processing bioprocess plants; NREL uses detailed factorial but 3.0 is appropriate screening proxy

source_name: Humbird et al. (2011) NREL/TP-5100-47764 — working capital convention
notes: Working capital fraction of fixed capital; NREL convention for nth-plant bioprocess TEA

source_name: Humbird et al. (2011) NREL/TP-5100-47764 — project finance screening assumption
notes: 10% nominal discount rate is NREL standard for bioprocess nth-plant screening; real rate would be lower

source_name: Humbird et al. (2011) NREL/TP-5100-47764 — plant lifetime
notes: 20-year operational life is standard for NREL bioprocess design reports

source_name: Badgett et al. (2024) NREL/TP-6A20-87625 — PEM electrolyzer manufactured cost
notes: NREL 2024 bottom-up manufactured cost for PEM stack + BOP at current volumes; range 800-1500 USD/kW depending on scale

source_name: Badgett et al. (2024) NREL/TP-6A20-87625 — stack replacement convention
notes: Annualized stack replacement cost as fraction of stack cost; applied over stack life

source_name: Badgett et al. (2024) NREL/TP-6A20-87625 — PEM stack lifetime
notes: Current PEM stack lifetime 40000-80000 h; 7 years at 90% CF ~ 55000 h

source_name: Educated guess — hollow-fiber gas-permeable membrane benchmark
notes: EDUCATED GUESS: PTFE/PP hollow-fiber membrane modules 50-200 USD/m2 depending on chemistry and supplier. 100 USD/m2 is a mid-range screening value. No single public benchmark exists.

source_name: Humbird et al. (2011) NREL/TP-5100-47764 — LP steam utility cost
notes: Low-pressure steam cost proxy for screening TEA; equivalent to ~20 USD/t which is in range of natural-gas-fired boiler steam

source_name: Educated guess — struvite slow-release fertilizer market proxy
notes: EDUCATED GUESS: Struvite pricing is fragmented. Vaneeckhaute et al. (2021 Sci Total Environ) report 0.28-0.50 USD/kg based on nutrient value; Ostara Crystal Green premium up to 1.0 USD/kg. 0.75 is optimistic mid-range for specialty slow-release product.

source_name: World Bank Commodity Price Data (Pink Sheet) — DAP/MAP fertilizer
notes: World Bank DAP/MAP global commodity price; 2020-2025 range 0.40-0.80 USD/kg. MAP (11-52-0) trades at slight discount to DAP.
